title: helichrysum mannii
intro: Helichrysum mannii, also known as Mountain Everlasting, is a flowering plant species native to the high-altitude mountainous regions of East Africa. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Helichrysum mannii include reducing inflammation and pain, improving circulation, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular natural remedy for conditions such as arthritis and wounds. The herbal preparations of Helichrysum mannii include essential oils, extracts, and teas, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
